summary: Multi-tenant data isolation testing completed successfully. All 31 tests passed. Verified that User A cannot access User B's data and vice versa across all resources (leads, campaigns, agents, webhooks, calls, dashboard stats).
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-tenant isolation is properly implemented with user_id filtering on all CRUD operations
Cross-user access correctly returns 404 (not 403) to avoid leaking existence of other users' data
Dashboard stats are properly filtered by user_id
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during test execution (TEST_ prefixed resources)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-tenant isolation fully tested and working. All resources (leads, campaigns, agents, webhooks, calls) are properly isolated by user_id. Cross-user access returns 404. Dashboard stats only show user's own data.

leads_isolation.GET /api/leads: User only sees own leads - PASS
leads_isolation.GET /api/leads/{id}: User cannot access other user's lead by ID (returns 404) - PASS
leads_isolation.PUT /api/leads/{id}: User cannot update other user's lead (returns 404) - PASS
leads_isolation.DELETE /api/leads/{id}: User cannot delete other user's lead (returns 404) - PASS

campaigns_isolation.GET /api/campaigns: User only sees own campaigns - PASS
campaigns_isolation.GET /api/campaigns/{id}: User cannot access other user's campaign (returns 404) - PASS
campaigns_isolation.PUT /api/campaigns/{id}: User cannot update other user's campaign (returns 404) - PASS
campaigns_isolation.DELETE /api/campaigns/{id}: User cannot delete other user's campaign (returns 404) - PASS

agents_isolation.GET /api/agents: User only sees own agents - PASS
agents_isolation.GET /api/agents/{id}: User cannot access other user's agent (returns 404) - PASS
agents_isolation.PUT /api/agents/{id}: User cannot update other user's agent (returns 404) - PASS
agents_isolation.DELETE /api/agents/{id}: User cannot delete other user's agent (returns 404) - PASS

webhooks_isolation.GET /api/webhooks: User only sees own webhooks - PASS
webhooks_isolation.PUT /api/webhooks/{id}: User cannot update other user's webhook (returns 404) - PASS
webhooks_isolation.DELETE /api/webhooks/{id}: User cannot delete other user's webhook (returns 404) - PASS

calls_isolation.GET /api/calls: User only sees own calls - PASS

dashboard_isolation.GET /api/dashboard/stats: Stats only reflect user's own data - PASS
